title: KADTC Dog Chess Puzzle Toy Brain Stimulation Mentally Stimulating Cognitive Busy Food Enrichment Boredom Toys Level 3 2 1 Treat Puzzles Puppy Interactive Mind Smart Game for Small/Medium/Large Dogs
features: [Innovative American Design with U.S. Patent and Brand ] KADTC is proud to offer a one-of-a-kind dog puzzle toy, designed and patented in the United States. This innovative toy features three levels of difficulty, allowing you to select the perfect challenge based on your dog’s cognitive abilities. Whether your dog is new to puzzles or has already developed basic skills, this adjustable design ensures a fun, engaging experience for all skill levels. A perfect gift for your beloved dog, whether it's for a birthday, a special occasion, or any holiday!

[Safe, Durable, and Pet-Friendly Materials] Designed with your dog's safety in mind, this toy is made from food-grade ABS material, free from harmful chemicals like BPA, PVC, and phthalates. The robust, secure construction ensures that all components remain intact, preventing accidental ingestion. Built to last, this puzzle toy can withstand heavy chewing and will continue to provide hours of safe, enjoyable play. The perfect gift that both pets and owners will appreciate!

[Three-in-One Puzzle for Maximum Engagement] Experience the ultimate puzzle challenge with KADTC’s unique design that combines three distinct difficulty levels in one toy. With four sliding compartments, nine movable boxes, and four removable flip-lid compartments, your dog will enjoy endless fun while solving the puzzle to retrieve treats. Customize the challenge to suit your dog’s needs, making it an ideal solution for intellectual stimulation and mental growth.

[Supports Mental Stimulation and Anxiety Relief] This interactive puzzle toy not only encourages mental stimulation but also helps alleviate anxiety by rewarding your dog with treats during play. Perfect for dogs with high energy or those who need additional mental engagement, it provides a calming, problem-solving experience. This toy promotes emotional stability, helping your dog integrate more harmoniously into family life, while keeping them entertained for hours.

[Healthier Digestion with Slow-Feeding Function] KADTC’s dog puzzle toy also doubles as a slow feeder, helping your pet eat at a healthier pace. By slowing down eating, it reduces the risk of bloating and promotes better digestion. Equipped with four non-slip rubber pads, it ensures stability and prevents tipping during use. Suitable for a variety of surfaces, including wood, tile, and carpet, this durable toy is easy to clean and is a must-have for any dog owner focused on their pet’s well-being.
description: Product Description Stabilize dogs' temperament and mood, make your dog smarter！ This is a dog game console, which combines three difficulty levels of gameplay, a very cost-effective product. The toy has 3 food obtaining methods: sliding, food dispensing and flipping the lid. With a total of 4 sliding-lid boxes, 9 mobile food boxes and 4 detachable flipping-lid food boxes. Food such as dog kibble can be put into these boxes, and you can change the difficulty of gameplay according to the dog's intelligence and training effect. The video showcases the product in use. We have a detailed video presentation of this product, where a professional trainer demonstrates the simplest ways to teach dogs how to use the toy. Easy to Clean and assemble!
